# Digitaliserings- og forvaltningsdepartementet

*13 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Lov om Digitaliseringsdirektoratets tilgang til taushetsbelagte opplysninger i F](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-06-09-29.md) | Lov om Digdirs tilgang til opplysninger i Folkeregisteret | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2023-06-09-29) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-06-09-29.md) · [v2023](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2023/lover/lov-2023-06-09-29.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2023-06-09-29.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2023-06-09-29.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2023-06-09-29.md) |
| [Lov om Norsk Lysingsblad](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) | Lov om Norsk Lysingsblad | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1946-10-11-1) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1946-10-11-1.md) |
| [Lov om beskyttelse av undersjøiske kabler og rørledninger utenfor sjøterritoriet](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) | Lov om undersjøiske kabler | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1884-06-14-3) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1884-06-14-3.md) |
| [Lov om elektronisk kommunikasjon (ekomloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-12-13-76.md) | Ekomloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2024-12-13-76) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-12-13-76.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2024-12-13-76.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2024-12-13-76.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2024-12-13-76.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i statsansatteloven (fortrinnsrett og rett til fast ansettelse)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-43.md) | Endringslov til statsansatteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-43) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-43.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-43.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-43.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring av EUs forordning om elektronisk identifikasjon og tillitst](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-06-15-44.md) | Lov om elektroniske tillitstjenester | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2018-06-15-44) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-06-15-44.md) · [v2018](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2018/lover/lov-2018-06-15-44.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2018-06-15-44.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2018-06-15-44.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2018-06-15-44.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2018-06-15-44.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonsplikt, karantene og saksforbud for politikere, embetsmenn og ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-06-19-70.md) | Karanteneloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2015-06-19-70) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-06-19-70.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2015-06-19-70.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2015-06-19-70.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2015-06-19-70.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2015-06-19-70.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2015-06-19-70.md) |
| [Lov om offentlige tjenestetvister [tjenestetvistloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) | Tjenestetvistloven – tjtvl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1958-07-18-2) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1958-07-18-2.md) |
| [Lov om statens ansatte mv. (statsansatteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-67.md) | Statsansatteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-06-16-67) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-67.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-06-16-67.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-06-16-67.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-06-16-67.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-06-16-67.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-06-16-67.md) |
| [Lov om statsforetak](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) | Statsforetaksloven – statsfol | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1991-08-30-71) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1991-08-30-71.md) |
| [Lov om statsføretak (statsføretakslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-04-10-9.md) | Statsføretakslova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-04-10-9) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-04-10-9.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-04-10-9.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-04-10-9.md) |
| [Lov om tilrettelegging for utbygging av høyhastighetsnett for elektronisk kommun](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-05-07-40.md) | Bredbåndsutbyggingsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2020-05-07-40) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-05-07-40.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2020-05-07-40.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2020-05-07-40.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2020-05-07-40.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2020-05-07-40.md) |
| [Lov om visse sider av elektronisk handel og andre informasjonssamfunnstjenester ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) | Ehandelsloven – e-hl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2003-05-23-35) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) · [v2003](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2003/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2003-05-23-35.md) |
